flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Grays Harbor College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.0k → $12.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Grays Harbor College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Grays Harbor College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Grays Harbor College rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $11.1k).
